mapper.update: UPDATE data_model_field SET del_flag = 1 WHERE model_id = #{modelId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO data_model_field ( model_id, tenant_id, field_name, field_code, column_name, field_type, length, precision, scale, is_required, is_unique, is_indexed, is_primary, default_value, dict_type, relation_type, relation_model_id, order_num, del_flag, created_by, created_time ) VALUES
( #{item.modelId}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.fieldName}, #{item.fieldCode}, #{item.columnName}, #{item.fieldType}, #{item.length}, #{item.precision}, #{item.scale}, #{item.isRequired}, #{item.isUnique}, #{item.isIndexed}, #{item.isPrimary}, #{item.defaultValue}, #{item.dictType}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.relationModelId}, #{item.orderNum}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.createdTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_model_field WHERE model_id = #{modelId} AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY order_num ASC
